# Tandem Docs

> Canonical documentation for Tandem at `https://docs.tandem.ac/`.
> If you are trying to understand the project quickly, start here.

## What this site covers

- Tandem engine usage, deployment, and configuration.
- Desktop and terminal workflows for operators and contributors.
- Agent orchestration, sessions, and MCP-based automation.
- SDKs, reference APIs, and protocol behavior.

## Best starting pages

- /start-here/ - Decide whether you need the CLI, web control panel, or source build path.
- /installation/ - Install the official packages and prerequisites.
- /install-cli-binaries/ - Install the master CLI, engine, and TUI binaries.
- /first-run/ - Run the first validation checklist.
- /control-panel/ - Use or scaffold the browser control panel.
- /tui-guide/ - Learn the terminal UI.
- /agents-and-sessions/ - Understand sessions and execution context.
- /agent-teams/ - Learn Tandem's agent-team orchestration model.
- /mcp-automated-agents/ - Build automated agent workflows.
- /webmcp-for-agents/ - Expose local HTTP APIs to agents.
- /configuration/ - Configure providers, keys, and system instructions.
- /build-from-source/ - Build Tandem from source.

## Reference pages

- /architecture/ - Internal architecture overview.
- /protocol-matrix/ - Port and protocol compatibility matrix.
- /engine-testing/ - Engine validation and testing notes.
- /sdk/ - SDK landing page.
- /sdk/typescript/ - TypeScript SDK.
- /sdk/python/ - Python SDK.
- /reference/engine-commands/ - Engine CLI reference.
- /reference/tui-commands/ - TUI command reference.
- /reference/tools/ - Tool API reference.
- /reference/spawn-policy/ - Spawn policy and safety gates.
- /reference/agent-team-api/ - Agent-team HTTP API.
- /reference/agent-team-events/ - Agent-team event stream contract.

## Desktop and deployment

- /desktop/overview/ - Desktop architecture and UX overview.
- /desktop/first-10-minutes/ - Guided onboarding for desktop users.
- /desktop/workflows/ - Common desktop workflows.
- /desktop/settings-and-safety/ - Safety and settings guidance.
- /desktop/learn-walkthroughs/ - Interactive Learn walkthroughs.
- /desktop/troubleshooting/ - Desktop troubleshooting.
- /desktop/headless-deployment/ - Desktop-to-headless deployment path.
- /headless-service/ - Headless engine service mode.
- /channel-integrations/ - Slack, Discord, Telegram, and related integrations.
- /browser-setup-and-testing/ - Browser setup and test flow.

## Where to find the source

- `guide/src/content/docs/` - Authoritative source for the published docs.
- `guide/astro.config.mjs` - Site config, base URL, and sidebar structure.
- `guide/src/styles/custom.css` - Docs styling.
- `docs/` - Deeper internal design and implementation docs.

## Full index

- /llms-full.txt - Exhaustive page map with source hints.

## External

- https://github.com/frumu-ai/tandem
